queries.feature_definition: Credit history: delay in paying off previous credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of delays in paying off previous credits to increased credit default risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation into the relationship between the absence of a checking account and decreased credit risk probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical assessment of checking account balances below 0 DM as a factor associated with reduced credit risk.
